name: Pending Incident Log Report
query:
SELECT
  `parent` as "Farm:Link/Farm:150",
  `date` as "Date:Date:100",
  `category` as "Category:Data:150",
  `equipment` as "Equipment:Data:130",
  `severity` as "Severity:Data:100",
  `closed` as "Closed:Check:80",
  `corrective_action` as "Corrective Action:Small Text:250"
FROM `tabFarm Incident Log`
WHERE `closed` = 0
ORDER BY `date` DESC

name: Incident Log Report
query:
SELECT
  `parent` as "Farm:Link/Farm:150",
  `date` as "Date:Date:100",
  `category` as "Category:Data:150",
  `equipment` as "Equipment:Data:130",
  `severity` as "Severity:Data:100",
  `closed` as "Closed:Check:80",
  `corrective_action` as "Corrective Action:Small Text:250"
FROM `tabFarm Incident Log`
ORDER BY `date` DESC

name: Vaccination Record Report
query:
SELECT
  `parent` as "Farm:Link/Farm:150",
  `vaccination_date` as "Vaccination Date:Date:120",
  `vaccine` as "Vaccine:Data:150",
  `batch_number` as "Batch Number:Data:120",
  `manufacturer` as "Manufacturer:Data:150",
  `administrator` as "Administered By:Data:150"
FROM `tabFarm Vaccination Record`
ORDER BY `vaccination_date` DESC

name: Water Quality Test Report
query:
SELECT
  `parent` as "Farm:Link/Farm:150",
  `sample_date` as "Sample Date:Date:120",
  `laboratory` as "Laboratory:Data:150",
  `tvc` as "TVC:Float:100",
  `ph` as "pH:Float:80",
  `pass_fail` as "Result:Data:100"
FROM `tabFarm Water Quality Test`
ORDER BY `sample_date` DESC

name: Visitor Log Report
query:
SELECT
  `parent` as "Farm:Link/Farm:150",
  `entry_time` as "Entry Time:Datetime:150",
  `visitor_name` as "Visitor:Data:150",
  `company` as "Company:Data:150",
  `purpose` as "Purpose:Data:180",
  `last_contact_with_poultry` as "Last Poultry Contact:Date:160"
FROM `tabFarm Visitor Log`
ORDER BY `entry_time` DESC
